narrative:
Washington Township has 2,622 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.7 percentage points.
